meta.summary: RSEM estimates gene and isoform expression from RNA-seq data and includes reference preparation, simulation, plotting, and EBSeq helper scripts.
meta.description: RSEM estimates gene and isoform expression from RNA-seq data and includes reference preparation, simulation, plotting, and EBSeq helper scripts.

test: test "$(cat /opt/rsem/VERSION.txt)" = '1.3.3' && rsem-calculate-expression --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'Current version: RSEM v1.3.1' >/dev/null

rsem-calculate-expression --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'rsem-calculate-expression' >/dev/null && rsem-prepare-reference --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'rsem-prepare-reference' >/dev/null && rsem-run-ebseq --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'rsem-run-ebseq' >/dev/null

bowtie --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'version 1.' >/dev/null && bowtie2 --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'version 2.' >/dev/null && hisat2 --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'version 2.' >/dev/null && STAR --version >/dev/null && samtools --version >/dev/null && /usr/local/bin/samtools-1.3/samtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'samtools 1.3' >/dev/null && Rscript -e 'library(EBSeq); cat(as.character(packageVersion("EBSeq")), "\n")' >/dev/null && python3 --version >/dev/null && perl -v >/dev/null && perldoc -V >/dev/null
rsem-simulate-reads 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && rsem-gff3-to-gtf --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage:' >/dev/null && rsem-refseq-extract-primary-assembly --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null

rm -rf /tmp/taf-rsem-ref-smoke && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-rsem-ref-smoke && cd /tmp/taf-rsem-ref-smoke && printf '>tx1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
>tx2
TGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCA
' > transcripts.fa && rsem-prepare-reference --bowtie2 transcripts.fa toy >/tmp/taf-rsem-ref-smoke/prepare.log 2>&1 && test -s toy.transcripts.fa && test -s toy.grp && test -s toy.idx.fa && test -s toy.1.bt2

rm -rf /tmp/taf-rsem-expr-smoke && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-rsem-expr-smoke && cd /tmp/taf-rsem-expr-smoke && printf '>tx1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
>tx2
TGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCA
' > transcripts.fa && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
+
IIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIII
@r2
TGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCA
+
IIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIII
' > reads.fq && rsem-prepare-reference --bowtie2 transcripts.fa toy >/tmp/taf-rsem-expr-smoke/prepare.log 2>&1 && rsem-calculate-expression --bowtie2 --no-bam-output --seed 123 -p 1 reads.fq toy sample >/tmp/taf-rsem-expr-smoke/run.log 2>&1 && test -s sample.isoforms.results && test -s sample.genes.results && grep -F 'TPM' sample.isoforms.results >/dev/null && grep -F 'expected_count' sample.genes.results >/dev/null

rm -rf /tmp/taf-rsem-matrix-smoke && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-rsem-matrix-smoke && cd /tmp/taf-rsem-matrix-smoke && printf 'gene_id	transcript_id(s)	length	effective_length	expected_count	TPM	FPKM
G1	T1	100	80	10	50	5
G2	T2	100	80	20	50	5
' > s1.genes.results && printf 'gene_id	transcript_id(s)	length	effective_length	expected_count	TPM	FPKM
G1	T1	100	80	12	50	5
G2	T2	100	80	18	50	5
' > s2.genes.results && rsem-generate-data-matrix s1.genes.results s2.genes.results > matrix.txt && test -s matrix.txt && grep -F 's1.genes.results' matrix.txt >/dev/null

upstream.name: RSEM
upstream.citation: Li and Dewey 2011; Leng et al. 2013 for EBSeq
